queries.description: Templates referenced by compositions (aggregation is done client-side; EHRbase 2.15 doesn't parse GROUP BY in free-form AQL).
queries.aql: SELECT c/archetype_details/template_id/value AS Template FROM EHR e CONTAINS COMPOSITION c

queries.description: Latest blood pressure per EHR (systolic + diastolic). ORDER BY uses the full path, not the SELECT alias — EHRbase's AQL parser rejects alias references in ORDER BY.
queries.aql: SELECT e/ehr_id/value AS EhrId, o/data[at0001]/events[at0006]/data[at0003]/items[at0004]/value/magnitude AS Systolic, o/data[at0001]/events[at0006]/data[at0003]/items[at0005]/value/magnitude AS Diastolic, o/data[at0001]/events[at0006]/time/value AS Taken FROM EHR e CONTAINS COMPOSITION c CONTAINS OBSERVATION o [openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.blood_pressure.v2] ORDER BY o/data[at0001]/events[at0006]/time/value DESC LIMIT 100

queries.description: Lab results within a relative date window (last 365 days). AQL parameter syntax is $name (dollar), not :name (colon).
queries.aql: SELECT e/ehr_id/value AS EhrId, o/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/data[at0003]/items[at0005]/value/magnitude AS Value, o/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/data[at0003]/items[at0005]/value/units AS Units, o/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/time/value AS Taken FROM EHR e CONTAINS COMPOSITION c CONTAINS OBSERVATION o [openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.laboratory_test_result.v1] WHERE o/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/time/value >= $from AND o/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/time/value <= $to

queries.description: EHR list with subject external ref. (Gender aggregation moved to a future demographics seed; plain EHR projection for now.)
queries.aql: SELECT e/ehr_status/subject/external_ref/id/value AS SubjectId, e/ehr_id/value AS EhrId FROM EHR e

queries.description: Minimal sanity query — should work on any seeded EHRbase.
queries.aql: SELECT e/ehr_id/value AS EhrId FROM EHR e LIMIT 1
